commands.repair_reason: Maintainer-owned draft needs focused validation and explicit acceptance of the hook telemetry payload compatibility change; no mechanical repair is indicated.; Cleared: The diff only changes Codex projector telemetry normalization, focused tests, a type guard signature, and changelog wording; no concrete security or supply-chain concern was found. commands.review_summary:
The PR updates the Codex app-server event projector so native webSearch items derive tool progress, after_tool_call params, result metadata, and display meta from Codex action metadata instead of empty top-level query strings.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction was established in this read-only review. Source inspection of current main plus the upstream Codex protocol shows webSearch.action metadata exists and current main drops it when item.query is empty.
commands.review_followup: Maintainer-owned draft needs focused validation and explicit acceptance of the hook telemetry payload compatibility change; no mechanical repair is indicated.

target.title: fix(codex): preserve native web search action metadata
target.body:
## Summary
- Preserve available Codex-native web search action metadata in tool progress and `after_tool_call` telemetry.
- Use `action.query` / `action.queries` when the top-level query is empty, and emit `queryUnavailable` instead of an empty-string query when the provider exposes no useful query.
- Keep #85346's behavior that native web searches are not mirrored into transcript snapshots.

## Verification
- Static diff check: `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD` -> passed after rebasing to `origin/main` `492d656d7485db3bca726d6da3c510d3919d18c5`.
- Autoreview: `AUTOREVIEW_AUTO_TESTS=0 AUTOREVIEW_OPENCLAW_MAINTAINER_VALIDATION=1 .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` -> clean, no accepted/actionable findings.
- AWS Crabbox focused projector proof: run `run_9a21ad003c44`, lease `cbx_29bfd8769709`, provider AWS c7a.8xlarge. Command: `pnpm test:serial extensions/codex/src/app-server/event-projector.test.ts`. Result: 1 file / 68 tests passed.
- AWS Crabbox fresh-PR changed gate after the latest rebase: run `run_3b59fe08555c`, lease `cbx_244faefc4281`, provider AWS c7a.8xlarge. Fresh checkout of `openclaw/openclaw#85378`, command `pnpm check:changed` -> passed.

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Codex-native web search no longer reports empty query or status-only result metadata to tool-progress hooks when action metadata is available, while web search items remain excluded from mirrored transcript snapshots.
Real environment tested: AWS Crabbox Linux runner, provider AWS c7a.8xlarge, fresh PR checkout of `openclaw/openclaw#85378` after rebasing onto `origin/main` `492d656d7485db3bca726d6da3c510d3919d18c5`.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `pnpm test:serial extensions/codex/src/app-server/event-projector.test.ts`; `pnpm check:changed`.
Evidence after fix: `run_9a21ad003c44` / `cbx_29bfd8769709` passed 68 focused projector tests including empty top-level query fallback to `action.query` / `action.queries` and explicit `queryUnavailable`; `run_3b59fe08555c` / `cbx_244faefc4281` passed fresh-PR `check:changed` lanes `extensions`, `extensionTests`, and `docs`.
Observed result after fix: tool-progress hook payloads preserve available native web search action metadata, do not emit `query: ""`, and still avoid mirrored transcript tool records for native web search.
What was not tested: a live Codex provider session with real native web search; proof is from the Codex app-server event projector contract and fresh PR changed gate.

Refs #85109
Follows #85346
target.author: vincentkoc
